calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-14-2023 Off Calendar

Motion And Notice Of Hearing (Motions)
Off Calendar Jan-27-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for motion for default judgment prove-up hearing.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 01:30:35 p.m. and concluding at 01:44:59 p.m.

Plaintiff Bank of America, N.A. represented by Carina Johnson, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Jose A. Zelaya not appearing.

GEORGE GARCIA is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff.

Court has reviewed the case and all filings pertaining to this hearing.
Counsel for Plaintiff presents outline and summary of case.

GEORGE GARCIA is examined by the Court. Witness attests that statements made by its counsel are true and correct.

GEORGE GARCIA is under direct examination.

The matter is submitted.
Based on the summary of the case, comments made by Plaintiff's Counsel, and the affirmation of Plaintiff's witness, the Court finds that Defendant is in breach of contract and the court awards monetary damages.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Bank of America, N.A., and against Jose A. Zelaya, as follows:

1. Damages: $28,638.48
2. Costs: $504.50

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $29,142.98

Proposed judgment signed as modified.
